title: Nani mo Minakute Ii
synopsis: This hand-drawn animation thematizes what we are looking at in everyday life. Created using pencils, pastels, and oil paints, the drawn pictures were then shot with a digital camera and spliced together as video. Set on a fantasy train representing a kind of mental landscape, a young man shuts himself off from the outside world by reversing his face so he does not see anything, while another man silently stuffs garbage into the face. (Source: Japan Media Arts Festival)

title: Sinbi Apateu: Ghost Ball Double X

synonyms: The Haunted House: The Secret of the Ghost Ball Double X

title: Baku TECH! Bakugan Gachi
synopsis: The second season of the TV Anime adaptation of the BakuTech manga series follows the battles of Team Dragaon in the Tavanel Cup.

title: Garouden: The Way of the Lone Wolf
titleRomaji: Garouden: The Way of the Lone Wolf
titleEnglish: Garouden: The Way of the Lone Wolf
titleNative: 餓狼伝: The Way of the Lone Wolf
synonyms: Garôden : La voie du loup solitaire
Garouden: Το Ταξίδι του Μοναχικού Λύκου
Garōden: El camino del lobo solitario
กาโร่เดน ศึกยอดคน: วิถีหมาป่าเดียวดาย
Garouden: Το Ταξίδι του Μοναχικού Λύκου
synopsis: On the run from a past crime, Juzo Fujimaki is blackmailed into joining an illicit tournament and has to face top martial artists in deadly match-ups. (Source: Netflix Anime)

tags.name: Martial Arts
tags.description: Centers around the use of traditional hand-to-hand combat.

title: Egumi Legacy
synonyms: 哎咕島消失的舔甜歌姬
synopsis: Floating in a certain ocean is an island called "EGU Island". The sole entertainment on this island is listening to the songstress, "End of the World". Day after day, the islanders are enchanted by her singing. However, this tranquil time is shattered in an instant. Since the disappearance of the songstress, the island has been filled with "anger", "doubt", and "anxiety". Various thoughts and intentions begin to stir...A licking war unfolds around, "End of the World"! The one who holds her destiny is the legendary legacy "EGUMI Legacy". (Source: Ani-One Asia)

title: Cow's Day
synopsis: A short animation depicting a long and peaceful day of a cow. Small episodes of mystical and sweet characters (animals) by simple line drawings are amusing. She uses a touch which looks as though the pencil drawing has been rubbed with an eraser which makes viewers feel a unique texture. A work by a student. Received a 11th Animation Division Encouragement Prize in the Japan Media Arts Festival.

title: Dragon Star Lord
synopsis: Gu Zhengfeng was originally the divine dragon that guarded the Dragon Star. He was seriously injured in an ancient battle with alien enemies and fell into a long sleep. Time flies, Gu Zhengfeng wakes up again and finds that the Shenlong Star has long changed, and the Shenlong that was once revered has become an evil dragon in people's mouth. In order to investigate the truth and retrieve the treasure hidden in the Dragon King Academy, Gu Zhengfeng He transformed into a human form and entered the Dragon King Academy as a tutor, but accidentally became a teacher of the Dragon Slaying Department. For this reason, Gu Zhengfeng taught the students carefully while working hard to find the treasure. After several investigations, Gu Zhengfeng discovered the knowledge of the Dragon King's treasure. Everyone has passed away, and the only clue now may be in the hands of Vice Dean Ye Jiangxue. In the process of approaching Ye Jiangxue, Gu Zhengfeng assisted Ye Jiangxue many times, which caused a r

title: Shinka ron
synopsis: Part of a series of animated short films shown at the Ghibli Museum in Mitaka called "Film Guru Guru" . The story of evolution, from the first aquatic organisms to modern man (and woman).

title: Kareinaru Budoukai
synopsis: Part of a series of animated short films shown at the Ghibli Museum in Mitaka called "Film Guru Guru" . A sewing dummy turns on itself. Her white dress then reveals her different layers of colors. It then returns to a stationary state.

title: Madaran kai
synopsis: Part of a series of animated short films shown at the Ghibli Museum in Mitaka called "Film Guru Guru" . The universe of strange and colorful creatures that are born, eat, are eaten… and are reborn indefinitely on the screen.

title: Sakana no Sakana
synopsis: Part of a series of animated short films shown at the Ghibli Museum in Mitaka called "Film Guru Guru" . A small white fish enters the frame and is eaten by a larger one, then the latter is in turn eaten by an even larger fish… At the end, only a huge white fish remains which seems to shrink in size. swimming towards the bottom of the screen. He leaves the frame and the cycle resumes.

title: Takolator
synopsis: Part of a series of animated short films shown at the Ghibli Museum in Mitaka called "Film Guru Guru" . An octopus goes up an escalator placed in the water.

title: Ranputan no Bouken
synopsis: Part of a series of animated short films shown at the Ghibli Museum in Mitaka called "Film Guru Guru" . The hero, Rambutan, fights against a rival inside an old convertible launched at high speed. His opponent manages to rush him out of the vehicle and then bends over the hero’s girlfriend who desperately resists by kicking him in the face. Meanwhile, Rambutan catches up with the car running. He throws himself on his enemy and gets rid of him then kisses his girlfriend. The rival arises again, separates the two lovers and he and Rambutan fight again. The cycle resumes.
